focus: correctness final adversarial stabilization/replay of all ten substantive active P1 claims and append-only reducer identity repair

findingDetails.title: Operator options with missing values silently target defaults
findingDetails.evidence: optionValue returns null for a present valueless option and the dispatcher coalesces missing --database to the default; a read-only status probe returned ok:true.
findingDetails.scopeProof: All commands share optionValue for database targeting; focused tests cover valued paths, while the malformed probe reproduced default selection.
findingDetails.recommendation: Reject present options without values and unknown options before selecting defaults; add parser matrix tests.

claimAdjudication.claim: A present operator option without its required value is accepted and may silently select the default database.
claimAdjudication.counterevidenceSought: Reviewed command-specific guards and ran the operator suite; generic missing-value and unknown-option rejection remain absent.
claimAdjudication.alternativeExplanation: Omitted database may intentionally default, but an explicitly present valueless flag is invalid under the documented nonzero invalid-input contract.
claimAdjudication.downgradeTrigger: A documented valueless-option contract, or generic rejection plus focused tests, disproves the claim.

findingDetails.title: Status throws when the database parent directory is absent
findingDetails.evidence: listGenerationPaths calls readdir before pointer absence handling; a read-only absent-parent probe returned ENOENT instead of published:false.
findingDetails.scopeProof: Status has one generation-directory enumerator; direct read and absent-parent probe reproduce the throw before its modeled absence DTO.
findingDetails.recommendation: Treat an absent parent as an empty generation set and add a clean-checkout status test.

claimAdjudication.claim: Status throws ENOENT instead of returning the modeled unpublished DTO when the database parent directory does not exist.
claimAdjudication.counterevidenceSought: Reviewed pointer absence handling and ran the operator suite; only existing-directory behavior is protected.
claimAdjudication.alternativeExplanation: Install-time setup may normally create the directory, but clean-checkout status is explicitly modeled and claimed.
claimAdjudication.downgradeTrigger: An enforced parent-directory precondition, or published:false handling plus a focused absent-parent test, disproves the claim.

traceabilityChecks.evidence: Production open checks generation identity but not the manifest artifact digest.
Execution policy and DB scenarios retain removed _db/_engine paths.
Parent reports Planned while child authorities report completed/COMPLETE/IMPLEMENTED.
Five operator examples retain the removed _db path.
Lifecycle state and relocated file entities remain stale.
Four consumers map post-query mismatch to no-fit despite modeled requery-required semantics.
Read-only malformed status probe selected the default and returned success.
Read-only absent-parent status probe returned ENOENT.
Comparator projects fields and tolerates DTO differences while packet claims full parity.
Only median-of-three timing on one 20-style synthetic request is reproducible.

noveltyJustification: Only two superseding identities are new: P1-011 and P1-012 replace the collided P1-007/P1-008 records without claiming fixes. The other eight active findings were replayed and remain unchanged; weighted new severity is 10 over weighted active severity 50.

reviewDepthApplicability.reason: The rendered final-stabilization prompt forbids broad discovery and requires direct replay.
